slime.name: Slime
slime.description: A bouncy green slime that helps you find items.

wolf_pup.name: Wolf Pup
wolf_pup.description: A loyal wolf pup that increases your attack.

owl.name: Owl
owl.description: A wise owl that increases your magic power.

phoenix_chick.name: Phoenix Chick
phoenix_chick.description: A legendary bird that boosts your HP and recovery.

dragon_hatchling.name: Dragon Hatchling
dragon_hatchling.description: A tiny dragon that breathes small sparks and boosts all stats.

shadow_cat.name: Shadow Cat
shadow_cat.description: A cat made of shadows that increases speed and critical chance.

golden_retriever.name: Golden Retriever
golden_retriever.description: A very good boy who finds extra gold everywhere.

forest_sprite.name: Forest Sprite
forest_sprite.description: A tiny forest spirit that guides you to hidden treasures.

iron_tortoise.name: Iron Tortoise
iron_tortoise.description: A heavily armored tortoise that strengthens your defenses.

arcane_fairy.name: Arcane Fairy
arcane_fairy.description: A glowing fairy that enhances magical energy.

battle_boar.name: Battle Boar
battle_boar.description: A fierce boar that charges into combat with you.

wind_fox.name: Wind Fox
wind_fox.description: A swift fox that increases movement and strike precision.

holy_lamb.name: Holy Lamb
holy_lamb.description: A blessed creature that passively restores vitality.

treasure_mimic.name: Treasure Mimic
treasure_mimic.description: A mischievous chest-creature that multiplies your gold gains.

storm_hawk.name: Storm Hawk
storm_hawk.description: A lightning-fast predator that enhances speed and power.

dragon_turtle.name: Dragon Turtle
dragon_turtle.description: An ancient hybrid beast that provides immense physical protection.

void_stalker.name: Void Stalker
void_stalker.description: A creature from the abyss that sharpens your critical strikes.

lucky_cat.name: Lucky Cat
lucky_cat.description: A waving cat figurine come to life, attracting luck and fortune.

bamboo_panda.name: Bamboo Panda
bamboo_panda.description: A round and absurdly calm cub from the Yixuan highlands. Merchants claim it brings good fortune. They are right.

jade_serpent.name: Jade Serpent
jade_serpent.description: A small serpent with scales of genuine jade, raised in the temple pools of River's Crown. Enhances magical attunement.

river_eel.name: Yi Xuan River Eel
river_eel.description: A sleek silver eel from the eastern rivers, quick as thought and twice as slippery. Improves your reaction speed.

lotus_frog.name: Lotus Frog
lotus_frog.description: A fat jade-green frog that sits on lotus leaves and occasionally does something useful for your mana.

silkworm.name: Golden Silkworm
silkworm.description: A fist-sized silkworm that produces shimmering thread worth considerable coin. Lucky merchants keep one.

celestial_crane.name: Celestial Crane
celestial_crane.description: A tall white crane from the sacred marshes of Yixuan, regarded as a divine omen. Its presence improves clarity and magical focus.

clan_bear_cub.name: Clan Bear Cub
clan_bear_cub.description: A cub of the great northern bear, raised by the Varak Bear Warrior order. Loyal, ferocious, and always hungry.

steppe_fox.name: Steppe Fox
steppe_fox.description: A lean amber fox from the Varak Iron Steppe. Impossible to catch and twice as quick as it looks.

northern_snowhare.name: Northern Snowhare
northern_snowhare.description: A white hare from the frozen north, unnervingly fast. The Varak say it brings clarity before battle.

tundra_wolf.name: Tundra Wolf
tundra_wolf.description: A pale, half-grown wolf from the deep northern tundra, larger than most full-grown southern wolves. A natural hunter.

kalovar_falcon.name: Kalovar War Falcon
kalovar_falcon.description: A trained falcon of the Kalovar military, hooded and disciplined. Scouts ahead for items and enhances strike precision.

bazaar_monkey.name: Bazaar Monkey
bazaar_monkey.description: A quick-fingered monkey from the Grand Bazaar markets, extremely adept at finding — or obtaining — gold.

corsair_parrot.name: Corsair Parrot
corsair_parrot.description: A sharp-beaked parrot from the Kalovar corsair fleets, fluent in four languages and none of them polite. Brings luck at sea.

ghost_cat.name: Ghost Cat
ghost_cat.description: A semi-translucent cat that wanders the ruins of Constanplea. It is unclear whether it is alive. It doesn't seem concerned.

constanplea_raven.name: Constanplea Raven
constanplea_raven.description: A large black raven that nests in the ruins of the old imperial library. Old enough to have seen the fall of the city.

crystal_crab.name: Crystal Cave Crab
crystal_crab.description: A crab grown entirely from crystalline mineral deposits in the deep caves. Its shell is harder than iron.

verdant_drake.name: Verdant Drake
verdant_drake.description: A young green drake from the eastern mountain passes. Not large enough to ride, but large enough to intimidate.

ink_spirit.name: Ink Spirit
ink_spirit.description: A small spirit that takes the form of a calligraphy brush stroke. Scholars of Yixuan claim it improves magical aptitude considerably.

ancient_tortoise.name: Ancient Tortoise
ancient_tortoise.description: A tortoise of genuinely unknowable age. The scholars of the Jade Examination Hall believe it predates the current dynasty. It is very slow and extremely durable.

void_firefly.name: Void Firefly
void_firefly.description: A firefly from the Echoing Void that pulses with dark light. Impossible to catch normally. Improves critical strikes and evasion.
